description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a large, high-resolution display. The screen features a vibrant cityscape wallpaper with pink and purple hues, suggesting it is powered on. The keyboard area is dark, with a standard layout and a visible touchpad below the keys. The chassis appears to be made of a matte black or dark gray material, likely aluminum or high-quality plastic, with a sleek and minimalistic design. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the lid or palm rest. The laptop is open at a wide angle, displaying both the screen and keyboard clearly.
description: A sleek, modern laptop with a vibrant cityscape wallpaper on its screen and a dark, minimalistic chassis. The keyboard and touchpad are clearly visible, and the device is open and powered on.
description_view_0: Front view showing the laptop's screen with a cityscape wallpaper and the lower edge of the keyboard.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and partial keyboard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the screen and the hinge, with the display content still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the open screen, keyboard, and touchpad from a different perspective.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a cityscape wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a visible function row and standard touchpad; no numeric keypad.
